headline: Robinhood CEO Defends the Math Behind 'Trump Accounts' Partnership
summary: Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev addresses analyst pushback over the brokerage's government partnership to manage "Trump Accounts." Tenev explains why the accounts will rely heavily on human customer service rather than AI, and calls the initiative a "once-in-a-lifetime opportunity."

headline: AI’s Hottest Private Companies Have Booming Crypto Shadow Market
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The race to sell retail investors a piece of the AI boom has gone mainstream — closed-end funds, interval funds, special-purpose vehicles. Now, crypto platforms are offering trades tied to the most valuable private AI companies on earth — ones ordinary investors have almost no other way to access.Most Read from BloombergUS Has Opened a Passage Through Hormuz, Central Command SaysUS and Iran Trade Fire in Gulf, Jolting Four-Week-Old TruceChina’s Unprecedented Defiance of US Sanctio
